title: BossCraft Respawn : Unofficial Port
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d7d46330c9711e7eaf489a37bd2fdccadbbd1e11.png)
Made by MCreator.
# Disclaimer
I'm Japanese, so I'm sorry if my English is wrong.
Also, I don't have the time, so I can't provide detailed support.

# About
This mod is an **unofficial port** of the **1.3.2 mod "BossCraft" created by Sthullen**.
It does not add any new features, and focuses on faithfully reproducing the functions of the original mod.

BossCraft adds unique mobs, bosses, and loot for each biome.

To reiterate, this mod is an **unofficial port** made by fans, and has no direct relationship with the original author or the original mod.

If there is any problem, it will be removed.

**Original Forum**

[https://www.minecraftforum.net/forums/mapping-and-modding-java-edition/minecraft-mods/1282120-1-3-2-bosscraft-v1-5-bosses-weapons-more-updated](https://www.minecraftforum.net/forums/mapping-and-modding-java-edition/minecraft-mods/1282120-1-3-2-bosscraft-v1-5-bosses-weapons-more-updated)

# How to Summon Boss

## 1.Collect Orbs
![Orb](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb963009a4a62258e73208e32f1cb3b9063381e3.png)

First, defeat the new mobs that spawn in various biomes and collect "orbs".

## 2.Craft the Scroll
![Scroll](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d873fb22e10fd689efe895d187ce59af0f59b909.png)

Use paper and a vanilla item that corresponds to the boss to create a "Scroll" to summon the boss.

## 3.Summon and Defeat Boss
![Weapon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/daca1c9f69af6a9bec6ccdfb15c79a0e232c4d87.png)

Using a Scroll will allow you to spend 20 Orbs to summon a boss. Defeat the boss to earn Advancement and new Gear!
